revision.comment: Bot: Create shrine page for Watatsumino Shrine Ronsha 4
Text replacement - "is a shrine in the Engishiki Jinmyōchō." to "is a shrine in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]."
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "| RONSHA ||" to "| {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|WD=Q135022904}}[[Category:RONSHA]] ||"
Text replacement - "Category:RONSHA" to "Category:Shikinai Ronsha"
Bot: Generate standardized Shikinaisha page (upgraded script - full property sections, ILL links, P361 categorization)
Bot: Generate standardized Shikinaisha page (V8 - proper ILL deity links, P13677 URLs, province extraction)
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v9.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Watatsumino Shrine Ronsha 4
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Watatsumino Shrine Ronsha 4
| coordinates = {{coord|34.365131|129.354361}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

'''Watatsumino Shrine Ronsha 4''' is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]].

== coordinate location (P625) ==

* {'latitude': 34.365131, 'longitude': 129.354361, 'altitude': None, 'precision': 1e-06, 'globe': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q2'}

== said to be the same as (P460) ==

* {{ill|Watatsumino Shrine|WD=Q135041548}}

[[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]]

{{wikidata link|Q135388116}}
